info.title: officetalk
info.description: Command-line tool for applying OfficeTalk operations to Microsoft Office documents. Supports Word (.docx) with snapshot semantics, validation, and address inspection.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: OfficeTalk - Apply deterministic operations to Office documents

commands.name: apply
commands.description: Execute an .otk file against a target Office document

commands.name: parse
commands.description: Dump the AST of an .otk file as JSON

commands.name: inspect
commands.description: Inspect a document using an .otk file with INSPECT blocks, or a bare address
